case_title: TRINIDAD HERMAN VS BLANCHARD ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINIDAD HERMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANCHARD ROBERT $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $488.00, NONE ACTION CONVERTED TO DAMAGE CLAIM,$795 LAST MO RENT CREDITED TO UNPAID 12/91 RENT, DAMAGE AWARD OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
